    "Install approved connector nails in all empty hanger holes per manufacturer specifications before framing inspection."

  "rationale": "Simpson Strong-Tie and IRC guidelines require all specified fastener holes in structural hangers to be filled with the correct size and type of nail to achieve the rated load capacity. Empty holes compromise the structural integrity of the connection.",
